# Code of Conduct

This document provides community guidelines for a safe, respectful, productive, and collaborative place for anyone willing to contribute to this project. It applies to all collaborative spaces, including issues, pull requests, commit comments, discussions, and any other communication channels associated with this project.

- Participants are expected to be tolerant of opposing views.
- Participants must ensure that their language and actions are free from personal attacks and disparaging remarks.
- When interpreting the words and actions of others, participants should always assume good intentions.
- Behavior that could reasonably be considered harassment will not be tolerated.

Instances of unacceptable behavior may be reported by contacting the project maintainer at <support@zealdocs.org>. All complaints will be reviewed and addressed appropriately.

---

*This Code of Conduct is adapted from the [Ruby Community Conduct Guideline](https://www.ruby-lang.org/en/conduct/).*
